item.title: Some more unmuted faves
item.description:
Sothern Raised, "Sixteen Tons" https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A9kb4-wUAU4
That's imgurian @CocoCapitainePoulet ! Upvotes go here: https://imgur.com/gallery/nOk70Nk And more goodness on his YouTube: https://m.youtube.com/user/Btrave/videos
--- Sorry for the difference in volume between some of these clips, I usually try to catch that but today I clearly failed. --- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag

item.title: Happy goth world day!
item.description:
World goth day* haha
Adorable, both of them
Happy Sunday guys! Spread some love to your fellow goth friends today! A friend of mine sent me this pic of me from a like 10 years ago and it was such a flashback to my young goth days https://imgur.com/a/A47d3Hj

item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Wholesome mini dump
item.description:
I've always turned towards Imgur on my low days. Today is one of them.
I have a great opportunity at hand to study abroad and work there for some time so that I and my family can have a better future.
You might be aware that it takes a good deal of money for international studies.
Unfortunately one of my relatives who said they'd support me financially have hit a roadblock and are now unable to do so.
Even with the student loan and my savings, I'm falling short of funds.
I'm not here asking anyone for a handout. I'm here to offer my services.
I'm a professional freelance website developer and I've been in this line of work for five years.
I will share the links to some of my projects below.
That being said, if you or anyone you know needs a website done, please get in touch with me.
I also offer other services like SEO, Google ads, logo designing
My recent projects: http://goamassagespa.com/ https://yognirodha.com/ https://www.eatswithmish.com/ https://wandervacations.com/ My portfolio website: https://flipcoder.in/ tl;dr : op is in need of website development work Have a nice day! :)
item.dc:creator: theFlipman

item.title: “It’s only ok if it’s my religion”
item.description: It’s so sad how biased and restrictive not to mention uncaring these people can be “Oh it’s only ok if it’s my faith”

item.title: Polish president hugs Zelensky at Ukrainian parliament
item.description: That body language. While Ukraine has been doing the heavy lifting during this war, Poland has taken in millions their refugees. This is brotherhood. Well done Poland as well.

item.title: Massive explosion
item.description: On 4 August 2020, a large amount of ammonium nitrate stored at the Port of Beirut in the capital city of Lebanon exploded, causing at least 218 deaths, 7,000 injuries, and US$15 billion in property damage, and leaving an estimated 300,000 people homeless. A cargo of 2,750 tonnes of the substance (equivalent to around 1.1 kilotons of TNT) had been stored in a warehouse without proper safety measures for the previous six years after having been confiscated by the Lebanese authorities from the abandoned ship MV Rhosus.
item.dc:creator: scragglynerfherder1

item.title: The genius of Carlin. Wait until the end.
item.description: The earth will recover. The species that exist during our brief occupation, will not.

item.title: Here's how Morgan Freeman made the 'list'.
item.description:
(2017)
I'll bet Tom Hanks, Robert DeNiro and Arnold Schwarzenegger are on it as well. Jim Carrey.. Hell, I'll bet they even have Betty White and Barbara Walters on there. Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Uz9PNoecNxU Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued)
